text: Enzymes are nature's speedsters, speeding up reactions crucial for life. They lower the activation energy needed for chemical reactions, acting like keys to unlock processes. Imagine a world without enzymes. Metabolism would grind to a halt, and life as we know it would cease. From digestion to DNA replication, enzymes power every reaction in your body. These molecular machines are incredibly specific, ensuring the right reactions happen at the right time. Curious about how enzymes shape our world? Hit that follow for more science insights!
